title: What the Hell o Kitty is this
display_title: What the Hell o Kitty is this
wikitext:
[]: What the Hell-o Kitty is this?!             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Fri Sep 18, 2009 1:24 am I've seen strange things in the fandom, but this has to be one of the strangest: The moment I ran across this thing, I thought to myself "Rei has to be the least Hello Kitty-like character in the Eva-verse, unless we're talking about Rei In Appearance Only or her AU incarnation in Episode 26..." Though I don't doubt Ibuki has a slew of Hello Kitty stuff hidden where people can't tease her about it or glare at it.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Fri Sep 18, 2009 1:34 am i'm shocked...the look kinda worked...

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Sep 18, 2009 3:11 am They should have a Domo Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Sep 18, 2009 3:26 am

[]:             Quote Post by Dirty Mick » Fri Sep 18, 2009 6:36 am I suddenly have the crazy urge to stick a red ribbon in Rei's hair.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Fri Sep 18, 2009 9:59 am Dirty Mick wrote: I suddenly have the crazy urge to stick a red ribbon in Rei's hair.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Sep 19, 2009 8:45 am That is unexpectedly awesome!

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Sep 19, 2009 11:26 am The fact that Hello Kitty and Rei Ayanami are both voiced by Megumi Hayashibara may have some relevance here.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Sat Sep 19, 2009 11:40 am Shin-seiki wrote: The fact that Hello Kitty and Rei Ayanami are both voiced by Megumi Hayashibara may have some relevance here.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Sun Sep 20, 2009 10:13 pm MatrixRefugee wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: The fact that Hello Kitty and Rei Ayanami are both voiced by Megumi Hayashibara may have some relevance here.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Sep 20, 2009 10:55 pm Mongoosedog wrote: hot damn...time to find rule 34 on hello kitty!

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Sep 20, 2009 11:15 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Mongoosedog wrote: hot damn...time to find rule 34 on hello kitty!

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Sep 20, 2009 11:23 pm Sammaeloo wrote: ...Do I want to know what rule 34 is?

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Sep 20, 2009 11:31 pm Alaska Slim wrote: Sammaeloo wrote: ...Do I want to know what rule 34 is?

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Mon Sep 21, 2009 1:00 am Sammaeloo wrote: Alaska Slim wrote: Sammaeloo wrote: ...Do I want to know what rule 34 is?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Sep 21, 2009 7:51 am Rule 34: If it exists, there's porn of it. No questions asked. I just wonder what Rules 33 and 35 are...

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Mon Sep 21, 2009 7:13 pm MatrixRefugee wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: The fact that Hello Kitty and Rei Ayanami are both voiced by Megumi Hayashibara may have some relevance here.

[]:             Quote Post by Mongoosedog » Mon Sep 21, 2009 7:18 pm i forgot to check this topic, i hope you all didn't think i got lost in the void of rule 34...to remove any fears i didn't rule 34 hello kitty

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Sep 22, 2009 2:08 am Bomby von Bombsville wrote: MatrixRefugee wrote: Shin-seiki wrote: The fact that Hello Kitty and Rei Ayanami are both voiced by Megumi Hayashibara may have some relevance here.

[]: What the Hell-o Kitty is this?!             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Fri Sep 18, 2009 1:24 am I've seen strange things in the fandom, but this has to be one of the strangest: The moment I ran across this thing, I thought to myself "Rei has to be the least Hello Kitty-like character in the Eva-verse, unless we're talking about Rei In Appearance Only or her AU incarnation in Episode 26..." Though I don't doubt Ibuki has a slew of Hello Kitty stuff hidden where people can't tease her about it or glare at it.
